slots.caption_ig:
We rank dishes. Not restaurants. Every dish scored on what actually matters. Pat's #1? Depends which sandwich. We tell you the difference. Free iOS beta.

#ForkFox #FoodRanked #DishNotRestaurant #PhillyFood #BayAreaEats
slots.caption_fb: Yelp ranks restaurants. Google ranks restaurants. The whole category ranks restaurants. The problem: a 4.7-star restaurant can serve a 2-star dish. We rank the dish itself — execution, freshness, ratio, ambiance, value — and surface the spot that's actually best for what you want to eat tonight.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16 video, 6 seconds. Split-screen: left shows a generic 4-star restaurant review, right shows a single dish with a glowing red #1 over it. Camera pans toward the dish. End frame: 'We rank dishes. Not restaurants.' with 'dishes' in red. Cinematic, low-key, editorial.
